# Q 

2 

M 

APC

## Interior / Exterior / maintenance

### Versatile all-purpose cleaner with adjustable strength.

Q²M APC is a powerful and versatile cleaner designed for both interior and exterior use. It is intended for situations where dedicated cleaners are not sufficient. The cleaning strength can be adjusted through dilution, making it suitable for a wide range of tasks.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2020/11/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_apc_1000_2023-1024x991.png)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## Powerful cleaner for all exterior and interior car surfaces.

Q²M APC provides flexible cleaning performance by allowing the user to adjust the dilution to the level of contamination. It can be used on many vehicle areas, from engine bays and wheel arches to interior surfaces.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons50.svg)

POWERFUL CLEANING ACTION 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons5.svg)

ALL SURFACE CLEANER 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons30.svg)

INDOOR & OUTDOOR USE 

what makes

Q2M APC so special? 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2020/11/gyeon-prodv2-bts-1-12-min-683x1024.jpg)

Adjustable dilution for different cleaning tasks

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2mapc.webp)

CAPACITIES 

1000 ML / 4000 ML

Consumption

150ml/car

DILUTION

1:5 to 1:15

## HOW TO USE

Q 

2 

M 

APC

01
Dilute Q²M APC according to the required cleaning task. 

02
Apply the solution to the surface or cleaning tool. 

03
Agitate gently if needed. 

04
Wipe or rinse away loosened contamination. Do not let it dry. 

05
Repeat with adjusted dilution if required. 

### Watch
product
video

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
Where can Q²M APC be used? 

On all automotive surfaces with correct dilution and common sense in mind.

02
How do I choose the correct dilution? 

Stronger dilutions for heavy dirt and exterior work (1:1/1:5, weaker for light interior cleaning (1:10/1:20)

03
Is it safe for interior use? 

Yes, when diluted correctly.

04
Can it be used in the engine bay? 

Yes, with appropriate dilution and care.

05
Does it replace dedicated cleaners? 

It is intended for cases where dedicated cleaners are not sufficient & you are looking for flexibility across a single product.

[FIND MORE ANSWERS](https://gyeon.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/sections/5742678389009-Q-M-APC)

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
